SELECT truncate(value, 0) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate;
SELECT truncate(value, 1) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate;
SELECT truncate(value, 2) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate;
SELECT truncate(value, 3) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate WHERE value < 0;
SELECT truncate(truncate(value, 1), 0) AS nested_truncate FROM test_truncate;
SELECT a.value, truncate(a.value, 1) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate a JOIN test_truncate b ON a.value < b.value;
SELECT value, truncate(value, 1) * 10 AS scaled_truncated FROM test_truncate;
SELECT DISTINCT truncate(value, 0) FROM test_truncate WHERE value != 0;
CREATE TABLE test_nested AS SELECT value, truncate(value, 1) AS truncated_value FROM test_truncate;
SELECT COUNT(*), truncate(AVG(value), 2) AS avg_truncated FROM test_truncate GROUP BY truncate(value, 0);
